title: Cursed Words and the Azure Tower
overview: Prince Oscar, heir to the throne of Farsas, was cursed in his childhood - a curse that prevents him from producing an heir. His last chance is the help of the Witch of the Azure Moon, but she lives in a gigantic azure tower that harbors many dangers...

title: The Past Recalled Once Again
overview: Tinasha has just arrived at Farsas Castle, when she finds that she must set off for the border. There, she confronts her past memories, as well as a foe who has been biding time for seventy years.

title: What the Forest Dreams Of
overview: Oscar and Lazar venture into a forest to investigate a series of mysterious deaths, out of Tinasha's watchful gaze. Unbeknownst to them, the Witch of the Forbidden Forest awaits within.

title: A Breath of Life into Image
overview: A foreign envoy shows up at Farsas Castle, demanding an audience with Tinasha. As Oscar is about to send him away, the mysterious envoy utters a name that changes his mind.

title: Unnamed Emotion
overview: The king reveals a new potential bride for Oscar: Miralys, a palace maid. A disgruntled Oscar notices that Tinasha has taken this opportunity to keep her distance from him.

title: As the Abyss is Born
overview: Tinasha finally succeeds in breaking the curse, thus fulfilling her contract with Oscar. In the middle of the king's birthday celebration, she comes to Oscar with a shocking revelation.

title: The End of the Dream
overview: Tinasha leaves Farsas to defect to Cuscull at Lanak's side. Something about her actions, however, don't quite add up, which does not escape the notice of Cuscull's chief mage.

title: Green Vines
overview: During a visit to a fortress on the border of Farsas, Oscar runs into a band of marauding nomads. Their leader challenges Oscar to a duel, on sacred grounds that hide a dark secret.

title: The Things Unknown
overview: The kingdom of Farsas enjoys some much-needed peace as the end of the year approaches. Beneath the tranquility, however, a plot is brewing with Farsas Castle as its target.

title: Blank Slate Children
overview: Tinasha finds out that her tower has some unexpected visitors. Oscar reluctantly prepares to attend a public function in the neighboring nation of Gandona.

title: Castle of Sand
overview: Oscar and Tinasha venture out to Yarda to find its missing princess, and to put an end to the escalating civil conflict orchestrated by the Witch Who Cannot Be Summoned.

title: Two Joined Memories
overview: One day, as Oscar is helping Tinasha clean up around the tower, he finds himself mysteriously drawn in by a familiar-looking orb.

title: From a Blank Page Anew
overview: Prince Oscar, heir to the throne of Farsas, was cursed in his childhood - a curse that prevents him from producing an heir. He travels to Tuldarr, a nation of mages, to seek help from their king.

title: Emerging from a Glass Cocoon
overview: A band of thieves kidnaps Tinasha while Oscar is away. Now, he must negotiate for her safe return, but they demand that Oscar relinquish a Farsas royal treasure: his trusty sword, Akashia.

title: Unanswered Prayer
overview: Tinasha and Prince Legis of Tuldarr are met with assassination attempts. A mysterious woman visits Farsas Castle and offers to bear Oscar's child.

title: Unseen Visage
overview: Oscar agrees to let Princess Nephelli of Yarda take refuge from strife in her homeland. However, they find an assassin has followed her into Farsas.

title: Returning the Promise
overview: Tinasha takes the throne once more as Tuldarr's queen. Oscar makes up his mind after Tinasha shocks all present at the coronation ceremony.

title: Bloodless Scars
overview: Tinasha visits a school in Tuldarr when disaster strikes. The nation of Cezar launches an invasion on Farsas.

title: Joyful Sorrow
overview: Oscar receives an unexpected guest, whose voice he recognizes. The secret of the witch's curse comes to light.

title: Half of Eternity
overview: Tinasha helps Travis deal with a pesky demon. Oscar finds a baby in the palace that is supposedly his child.

title: Pride of the Past
overview: Tinasha travels to Magdalsia to diagnose a magical malady, but comes across an enigmatic intruder instead.

title: Once upon a Time with You
overview: Valt, the newly-appointed chief mage of Farsas, investigates a series of mysterious deaths and suicides.

title: At Memory's End
overview: Magdalsia's aggression forces Tuldarr into war, but Oscar learns the shocking truth behind the instigator.

title: Death of the Nameless Nation
overview: With Tuldarr in grave danger, Tinasha must decide whether to do as Valt demands and destroy Eleterria.
